\tzpentry{ID5740}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5740 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{A}_{tunnel} = \frac{\Phi_0}{2\pi r_\perp}\hat{\boldsymbol{\phi}} \sum_{n=1}^{N_q} e^{-S_n/\hbar}\sin(n\phi + \omega_n t) \end{equation}
